ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the user */,
  "self_tracking_experience" TEXT /* User's self-tracking experience */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user (in kg) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user (in cm) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the goal */,
  "goal_name" TEXT /* Name of the goal */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Description of the goal */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of the goal (e.g., exercise, diet, social) */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the goal */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the target value */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for achieving the goal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the goal was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the goal was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity type */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "calories_burned" INTEGER /* Calories burned during the activity */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance covered during the activity (in km) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the activity was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the activity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_activity_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_type_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "activity_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_goals" (
  "activity_goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity-goal link */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the goal */,
  "progress" REAL /* Progress towards the goal (0-100%) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_goals_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES goals ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_goals_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time of the log entry */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "log_data" TEXT /* Detailed data about the activity (e.g., GPS coordinates, heart rate) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goal_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal log */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the goal */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time of the log entry */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "log_data" TEXT /* Detailed data about the goal (e.g., food intake, social interactions) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goal_logs_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES goals ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "friendships" (
  "friendship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each friendship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "friend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the friend */,
  "friendship_status" TEXT /* Status of the friendship (e.g., pending, accepted) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the friendship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the friendship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("friendship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friendships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friendships_friend_id FOREIGN KEY ("friend_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forums" (
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum */,
  "forum_name" TEXT /* Name of the forum */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forum */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the forum was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the forum was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forum_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forum */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_posts_forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id") REFERENCES forums ("forum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES forum_posts ("post_id")
)
